mechanics.excerpt: The shooter must manually work the bolt t0 eject spent cartridges and feed new rounds Characters must expend Simple Action to work the bolt after each shot: Automatic Rlfle: Somewhat less reliable than bolt-action rifle, the automatic rifle is more popular because i5 easy t0 reload and is capable of burst fire Like the auto pistol (above), the automatic rifle will jam on fumble.
